Who I Am

About Me

I am a first-year BSc Physics student at Carmichael College, Rangpur — but my true classroom is the entrepreneurial world. My friends know me as Sirat, and that forward-moving spirit defines everything I do.

I run two active ventures: Jersefy, a custom jersey brand with 300+ satisfied customers, and Gorom Korai, a student food startup. I am also enrolled at As-Sunnah Skill Development Institute studying Sales & Marketing.

Guided by Islamic values, I approach business with honesty, strategy, and purpose. I now offer professional CV writing and portfolio webpage services to help fellow job-seekers present their best selves.
